title: Iconiq-Backed IT Startup NinjaOne Hits $12.3 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Iconiq 支持的 IT 初创公司 NinjaOne 估值达到 123 亿美元
summary: NinjaOne, an IT management platform, has more than doubled its valuation to $12.3 billion in a new financing deal, bucking the trend of investors shying away from software-as-a-service companies over AI fears. The startup is set to announce Tuesday that it’s raised $400 million in a secondary share sale. Wellington Management, Iconiq Capital, Alphabet Inc.’s CapitalG and Sequoia Capital participated in the deal, which saw some early investors and longtime employees sell equity. NinjaOne was prev

title_cn: 在 General Atlantic 领投的一轮融资中，Iceye 估值跃升至 100 亿欧元
summary: Iceye Oy quadrupled its valuation to more than €10 billion ($11.5 billion) in a General Atlantic-led funding round that will help the Finnish satellite-intelligence company expand to meet demand for sovereign technology systems.

title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
title_cn: 伊朗和以色列承诺停止威胁会谈的袭击
summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation.

title: What Rolling Back Brexit Would Mean for the UK Economy
title_cn: 推迟脱欧对英国经济意味着什么
summary: Keir Starmer’s Labour government wants to get closer to Europe, but must choose from a range of options.

title: How the UK’s Options for Rebuilding Ties With Europe Stack Up
title_cn: 英国与欧洲重建关系的选择如何叠加
summary: Leaving the European Union has cost the UK 2% to 4% of forgone economic output but almost half can be recovered by improving trade with the bloc, according to analysis by Bloomberg Economics for the 10-year anniversary of the Brexit referendum.

summary: The property, the oldest in Jakarta’s historic Menteng district, is one of many that lie derelict in the world’s largest city.

title: SpaceX IPO Is Well Oversubscribed With $10 Billion Orders
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 超额认购，订单金额达 100 亿美元
summary: SpaceX’s initial public offering is well oversubscribed with multiple institutional investors placing orders for about $10 billion or more of shares, according to people familiar with the matter, as demand builds for a potentially record-setting debut.

title_cn: OpenAI 秘密申请 IPO、苹果人工智能重启等等

title: AI-Obsessed Amazon Pulls Off a History-Making Debt Deal in Canada
title_cn: 痴迷于人工智能的亚马逊在加拿大完成了历史性的债务交易
summary: Also: Red flags for the stock market

title: China’s Trade Imbalance With EU Swells as Imports Slip Again
title_cn: 进口再次下滑，中国与欧盟的贸易失衡加剧
summary: China’s imports from the European Union dropped for the first time in three months, again swelling a trade imbalance that’s put it on a collision course with the bloc.

title: StoneX Plans to Deepen India Presence Beyond First Trading Desk
title_cn: StoneX 计划在第一个交易平台之外深化印度业务
summary: StoneX Group Inc. plans to expand into base metals and agricultural commodities after setting up its first precious metals trading desk in India in June, according to top executives, deepening its presence in the fast-growing economy after serving it for years from overseas hubs.

title: ECB 'At a Minimum' Is Going to Hike Twice, BNP Paribas Says
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行表示，欧洲央行“至少”将加息两次
summary: Sam Lynton-Brown, head of global macro strategy at BNP Paribas, speaks on Blomberg Television about the outlook for Federal Reserve and European Central Bank policy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intesa’s Messina Braces for Bidding War Over Monte Paschi
title_cn: 联合银行的墨西拿为蒙特帕斯基的竞购战做好准备
summary: Intesa Sanpaolo SpA Chief Executive Officer Carlo Messina signaled he’s prepared to address any counterbids for Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA, after unveiling an offer that valued the world’s oldest bank at more than €30 billion ($35 billion).

title: German Industry Output Sees First Gain Since Iran War Began
title_cn: 德国工业产出自伊朗战争开始以来首次增长
summary: German industrial production grew for the first time since war broke out in Iran, fueling hope that Europe’s largest economy is weathering the jump in energy costs.

title: Bond Backed by French SME Loans Looks to Open a New Debt Market
title_cn: 法国中小企业贷款支持的债券有望开辟新的债务市场
summary: French state-backed lender Bpifrance SACA is selling a new type of bond backed by small company loans, looking to end a more than decade-long regulatory impasse over European Secured Notes.

title: Stocks Climb as AI-Led Rebound Enters Day Two: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着人工智能引领的反弹进入第二天，股市上涨：市场总结
summary: A recovery in the artificial-intelligence trade entered a second day in a cautiously risk-on session, with oil prices also falling as hostilities in the Middle East eased.

title: Uber-Backed Wayve Eyes Stake Sale on the UK’s New Private Market
title_cn: Uber 支持的 Wayve 着眼于英国新私人市场出售股份
summary: Wayve Technologies Ltd., the UK-based autonomous driving software startup, is considering letting investors sell shares through the country’s new private securities market, according to people familiar with the matter, in what would be the first major endorsement of the novel system.

title: Indonesia Delivers Shock Rate Hike to Reverse Market Selloff
title_cn: 印度尼西亚大幅加息以扭转市场抛售
summary: Indonesia’s central bank took aggressive action to reverse a market selloff and support its currency, hiking interest rates in a surprise decision to halt foreign outflows triggered by policy uncertainty under President Prabowo Subianto.

title: Colombia’s Beleaguered Oil Sector Eyeing Comeback in Venezuela
title_cn: 陷入困境的哥伦比亚石油行业着眼于委内瑞拉东山再起
summary: In a reversal of fortune, oil companies in Colombia, where outgoing president Gustavo Petro has all but barred exploration for the last four years, are scoping out Venezuela.

title: Brookfield, GIP Defy War to Advance $7.5 Billion Kuwait Deal
title_cn: Brookfield 和 GIP 不畏战争推进 75 亿美元科威特交易
summary: BlackRock Inc.’s Global Infrastructure Partners and Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. are among private equity firms shortlisted to buy a stake in a Kuwaiti pipeline network, indicating sustained interest for marquee Gulf assets despite a monthslong war that’s impacted regional production and roiled energy markets globally.

title: India’s Top Bank in $1 Billion Funding for Sun Pharma’s US Deal
title_cn: 印度顶级银行为 Sun Pharma 的美国交易提供 10 亿美元融资
summary: State Bank of India plans to join a group of global lenders in funding Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd.’s $12 billion overseas acquisition, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Oil Falls as Israel-Iran Attacks Halt and China Slashes Imports
title_cn: 随着以色列和伊朗袭击停止以及中国削减进口，油价下跌
summary: Oil declined after Israel and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other following a flare-up in violence, while new data shed a light on the extent of a drop in Chinese imports.

title: Ukraine Estimates $11 Billion in Farm Losses From Russia Strikes
title_cn: 乌克兰估计俄罗斯袭击造成 110 亿美元农场损失
summary: Ukraine’s agricultural sector suffered direct losses of more than $11 billion as Russian drone strikes intensified sharply at the end of last year, according to Deputy Economy Minister Taras Vysotskyi.

title: Intesa's Offer for Paschi Is the Only 'Real' One, CEO Messina Says
title_cn: 首席执行官梅西纳表示，联合银行对帕斯基的报价是唯一“真实”的报价
summary: Intesa Sanpaolo CEO Carlo Messina discusses the lender's offer to buy Italian rival Banca Monte dei Paschi for €30.6 billion ($35.3 billion). "The only real offer now in the market is the Intesa Sanpaolo offer," Messina tells Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua, calling Banco BPM's proposal of a merger of equals merely a "love letter." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Gets Booed at NBA Finals
title_cn: 特朗普在NBA总决赛中遭到嘘声
summary: President Donald Trump attended the highly anticipated New York Knicks playoff in Madison Square Garden, drawing a heightened security presence and boos from the crowd. Annmarie Hordern has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasury Market Is Telling Kevin Warsh Rates Need to Be Higher
title_cn: 国债市场告诉凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）利率需要更高
summary: The $31 trillion Treasury market has an unequivocal message for Kevin Warsh’s Federal Reserve: Interest rates aren’t high enough.

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Rise Most in Two Months on AI Dip-Buying
title_cn: 人工智能逢低买入导致新兴市场股票两个月来涨幅最大
summary: Emerging-market stocks rebounded, led by South Korea, as investors snapped up artificial intelligence shares at lower prices after Monday’s selloff. Developing-nation currencies advanced after Iran and Israel paused hostilities.

title: Citi’s Chew Sees Aggressive Short-Selling Positions in US Stocks
title_cn: 花旗集团的 Chew 看到美国股票的激进卖空头寸
summary: Traders are aggressively building short-selling positions in US stocks, while bullish wagers on the tech sector remain stretched, putting the market at risk, according to Citigroup Inc. strategists.

title: Maybank Handles $4.9 Billion of Deals for Johor Zone
title_cn: 马来亚银行为柔佛区处理价值 49 亿美元的交易
summary: Malayan Banking Bhd said the Johor-Singapore special economic zone will drive further expansion, with Malaysia’s biggest lender having facilitated about 20 billion ringgit ($4.9 billion) in financing and investments in the area in the past couple of years.

title: Indonesia May Hike Rate Again to Shield Currency, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师表示，印度尼西亚可能再次加息以保护货币
summary: Indonesia may raise interest rate again to shield the rupiah and curb market volatility, according to analysts, after the central bank’s surprise tightening on Tuesday helped the currency rebound from record lows and boosted stocks.

title: South Korea Steps Up FX Policing to Defend Won After Slide
title_cn: 韩国加强外汇监管以捍卫韩元下滑
summary: South Korea is set to crack down on speculative foreign-exchange trading, with regulators planning on-site inspections and investigations into suspected market-disruptive activities, the finance ministry said.

title: Intesa CEO Says Monte Paschi Could Open Path to European Deals
title_cn: Intesa首席执行官表示Monte Paschi可以为欧洲交易开辟道路
summary: Intesa Sanpaolo SpA Chief Executive Officer Carlo Messina said a successful takeover on Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA would position his bank to engage in deals across Europe.

title: Gold Steadies After Israel and Iran Agree to End Missile Strikes
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗同意结束导弹袭击后金价稳定
summary: Gold was steady after Israel and Iran agreed to end attacks that had jeopardized talks to end the war in the Middle East.

title: Leveraged ETF Goes Haywire in Korea With Wrong-Way 40% Moves
title_cn: 杠杆 ETF 在韩国陷入混乱，40% 的错误走势
summary: A leveraged exchange-traded fund tracking SK Hynix Inc. deviated sharply from the underlying stock’s move for a second day, underscoring the risk of investing in such products that have attracted strong retail interest.

title: Korean Stocks Jump 8% as Chip Shares Rebound After AI Selloff
title_cn: 人工智能抛售后芯片股反弹，韩国股市上涨 8%
summary: Memory chipmaker shares led a rebound in South Korean stocks, demonstrating investors aren’t quite ready to throw in the towel on the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Giant Oil Supertanker Orders Eclipse Record Set in 2008
title_cn: 巨型石油超级油轮订单刷新 2008 年创纪录
summary: The world’s shipowners have placed orders for a record number of new oil supertankers, surpassing a boom back in 2008 that ultimately led to a glut and a collapse in rates.

title: Copper Resumes Gains as Mideast Tensions Ease, Stocks Rebound
title_cn: 随着中东紧张局势缓和、股市反弹，铜价恢复上涨
summary: Copper resumed its advance along with other industrial metals as tensions eased in the Middle East, boosting risk appetite.

title: AI Rally Remains Supported After Friday Pullback: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 周五回调后 AI 反弹仍受支持：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Tom Mackenzie and Adam Linton break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Basque Region Raising €500 Million Bond for Industrial Strategy
title_cn: 巴斯克地区筹集 5 亿欧元债券用于工业战略
summary: The Basque government is raising €500 million ($577 million) from bonds to support the Spanish region’s industrial investment strategy.

title: Anthropic Calls Mythos Dangerous. Why Is It Expanding Access?
title_cn: 人择称神话是危险的。为什么要扩大准入范围？
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant initially released Mythos to a small group of carefully chosen parties because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI Can Rewrite History for Megacap IPOs
title_cn: SpaceX、Anthropic、OpenAI 可以改写 Megacap IPO 的历史
summary: The history of megacap initial public offerings shows that the stocks usually slump in the first year of trading. But upcoming listings from SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI are big enough and systemically important enough to the market that those analogies may not apply.

title: China Prepares $295 Billion Plan to Fund Nationwide AI Buildout
title_cn: 中国准备2950亿美元计划资助全国人工智能建设
summary: China is preparing to spend around 2 trillion yuan ($295 billion) over the next five years on building data centers across the country, fueling Beijing’s ambition to propel the domestic AI sector and surpass the US in a potentially game-changing technology.

title: Apple Expands Child Safety Tools as Social Media Bans Grow
title_cn: 随着社交媒体禁令的增加，苹果扩展了儿童安全工具
summary: Apple Inc. is expanding tools for parents to protect children online, a move that comes as governments around the world increasingly ban social media for young people.

title: Why Jensen Huang Talking up Suppliers Is Worrying
title_cn: 为什么黄仁勋谈论供应商令人担忧
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's investment advice involving the company's suppliers is dangerously rosy, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Shuli Ren says. Ren argues that concrete guidance, not outsized optimism, is what's needed from Huang and other tech titans. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Rebounds as Malaysia Positions for the Next Wave | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/09/2026
title_cn: 马来西亚为下一波浪潮做好准备，科技股反弹哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 06/09/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadband Firms’ Land Grab Backfired and Banks Are Selling Out
title_cn: 宽带公司的土地掠夺适得其反，银行正在出售
summary: Banks with exposure to heavily-indebted broadband providers are selling their loans to distressed debt funds at a discount, a sign of their increasing weariness with the cash-strapped sector.

title: Stocks Extend Rebound; BofA Warns of 'Bear Market Signposts'
title_cn: 股市延续反弹；美国银行警告“熊市路标”
summary: A rebound in equities that began on Wall Street extended into Asia, as cheaper valuations for artificial intelligence shares lured investors. Meanwhile, Bank of America Securities strategists led by Savita Subramanian warned that an increasing number of “bear market signposts” point to an approaching top. Bloomberg's David Savage reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Paytm Plans 10% Staff Boost in AI Pivot With Some Roles Cut
title_cn: Paytm 计划在 AI 支点上增加 10% 的员工并削减一些职位
summary: Indian fintech pioneer Paytm is set to hire about 4,000 people over the next nine months, part of a pivot aimed at expanding its merchant network and artificial intelligence-driven product offerings.

title: MSIA: Malaysia 2026 Semiconductor Exports Can Hit $197B
title_cn: MSIA：马来西亚2026年半导体出口额可达$197B
summary: Malaysia Semiconductor Industry Association President Wong Siew Hai believes the country's semiconductor exports can hit about $200 billion this year. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Invest Malaysia' in Kuala Lumpur. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Maybank Handles $4.9B Deals For Singapore, Malaysia Hub
title_cn: Maybank 为新加坡、马来西亚中心处理 $4.9B 交易
summary: Khairussaleh Ramli, President and Group CEO at Maybank, says the Johor-Singapore special economic zone will drive further expansion, with Malaysia’s biggest lender having facilitated about $4.9 billion in financing and investments in the area in the past couple of years. He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts from the sidelines of the Invest Malaysia conference in Kuala Lumpur.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tencent Is Marketing Bonds That May Raise Up to $4.5 Billion
title_cn: 腾讯正在发行债券，融资金额可能高达 45 亿美元
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. began marketing dollar and yuan bonds in an offering that could raise as much as $4.5 billion, people familiar with the matter said, an upward shift from initial thinking following discussions with investors.

title: Bursa Malaysia Taps AI Demand for Growth
title_cn: 马来西亚证券交易所利用人工智能需求促进增长
summary: Bursa Malaysia CEO Fad’l Mohamed says the AI buildout has supported the growth of the stock exchange. He speaks with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of the Invest Malaysia conference in Kuala Lumpur. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Delays Siri AI for iPhone Users in the EU, Says Regulators Refusing to Engage
title_cn: 监管机构拒绝参与 苹果推迟向欧盟 iPhone 用户提供 Siri AI
summary: Apple Inc. said it isn’t currently able to launch Siri AI, its redesigned digital assistant, on iPhones, Apple Watches or iPads in the European Union, marking the company’s latest standoff with the continent’s antitrust watchdog.

title: Apple’s iOS 27 Is Filled With Hints About Its Upcoming Foldable iPhone
title_cn: 苹果的 iOS 27 充满了关于即将推出的可折叠 iPhone 的暗示
summary: Apple Inc.’s iOS 27 and related software updates offer the clearest public signs yet of the company’s upcoming foldable iPhone, revealing references to folding hardware and new features designed for larger, more flexible displays.

title: Apollo Wraps Up $35 Billion Chip Deal for Anthropic
title_cn: Apollo 为 Anthropic 完成 350 亿美元芯片交易
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. have finalized a $35 billion financing package for Anthropic PBC to expand its AI infrastructure, marking the latest mega-deal in the artificial intelligence race.

title: Musk’s xAI Taps Starlink Staffer to Run Grok Training Team
title_cn: 马斯克的 xAI 聘请 Starlink 员工来管理 Grok 培训团队
summary: Elon Musk’s xAI has brought over an executive from SpaceX’s Starlink satellite-internet service to run the team that trains its Grok chatbot, replacing college-aged engineer Diego Pasini, according to an internal note seen by Bloomberg News.

title: Fujikura Is Raising Prices on Data Center Cables to Beat Outlook
title_cn: 藤仓正在提高数据中心电缆的价格以应对前景
summary: Fujikura Ltd. is on a track to beat its outlook thanks to sustained demand for fiber-optic cables essential for AI data centers and a plan to raise prices, according to its top executive.

title: OpenAI Files Confidentially for IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 秘密提交 IPO 文件
summary: OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT, filed confidentially for an IPO, joining artificial intelligence rivals in tapping public markets to fund ambitious growth plans. Bloomberg's Michael Hytha has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK to Repay Visa Fees to Growth Firms Which Recruit Abroad
title_cn: 英国将向在海外招聘的成长型企业偿还签证费
summary: The UK government will reimburse visa fees incurred by fast-growing companies when they recruit talent from abroad, in an effort to make Britain a friendlier environment for technology firms.

title: Sri Lanka Emerging as a New Base for Asia’s Scam Networks
title_cn: 斯里兰卡成为亚洲诈骗网络的新基地
summary: The crackdown on scam compounds in Cambodia is leading some gangs to relocate to beach resorts and office buildings in Sri Lanka, in what may be the next phase of one of the world’s fastest-growing criminal industries.

title: Wall Street Claws Back Friday’s Losses | The Close 6/8/2026
title_cn: 华尔街收复周五跌幅|收盘价 6/8/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Seaport Research Partners Chief Equity Strategist Jonathan Golub, FuelCell Energy President & CEO Jason Few, Morgan Stanley Research Senior Analyst, Healthcare Services Erin Wright, Siri Co-Founder & Former CEO Dag Kittlaus, Ingredion CEO James Zallie, Pictet Research Institute Head Maria Vassalou, Research Affiliates Chief Investment Officer Jim Masturzo, Wellington Late-Stage Growth Heat Matthew Witheiler, NYNJ Host Committee for the FIFA 2026 World Cup Chief Executive Officer Alex Lasry, & Former CEO of Modell’s Sporting Goods Mitch Modell. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Files Confidentially for IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 秘密提交 IPO 文件
summary: OpenAI filed confidentially for an IPO with the SEC, working with Goldman Sachs Group and Morgan Stanley on a potential listing. Romaine Bostick reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Files Confidentially for IPO as Rivals Compete for Cash
title_cn: 竞争对手争夺现金，OpenAI 秘密申请 IPO
summary: OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT, filed confidentially for an IPO, joining artificial intelligence rivals in tapping public markets to fund ambitious growth plans.

title: Apple Investors Give Lukewarm Reaction to New Siri, AI Platform
title_cn: 苹果投资者对新的 Siri 和人工智能平台反应冷淡
summary: Apple Inc. used its Worldwide Developers Conference to lay the foundation for a new generation of products, making the case that it can overcome years of snags to compete in the AI era.

title: Cipher Sells Junk Debt for Amazon-Tied Data Center Project
title_cn: Cipher 为亚马逊数据中心项目出售垃圾债务
summary: Cipher Digital Inc. raised $810 million from a junk-bond sale to help fund a data center tied to Amazon.com Inc., adding to a wave of riskier debt financing backing the artificial intelligence infrastructure boom.

title: Germany Pursues New Partners After Next-Gen Jet Collapse
title_cn: 德国在下一代喷气式飞机坠毁后寻求新合作伙伴
summary: Germany is seeking new partners to build a next-generation fighter jet after a prestigious project with France collapsed over disagreements between industry partners.

title: Graham Platner’s Scandals Risk Spoiling Democrats’ Bet in Maine
title_cn: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的丑闻可能会破坏民主党在缅因州的赌注
summary: Graham Platner heads into Maine’s Democratic Senate primary on Tuesday facing a fresh bout of controversy, turning what had looked like a coronation into a test of whether he’s a viable candidate for the party’s push to secure a majority in this year’s midterms.

title: 10 Years of Brexit: What's the Cost and What's Next?
title_cn: 英国脱欧十年：代价是什么以及下一步是什么？
summary: Ten years after Brexit, analysis published by Bloomberg on Tuesday shows that the UK’s vote to leave the European Union may have already cost the British economy between 2% and 4% of gross domestic product. Dan Hanson of Bloomberg Economics explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Strikes India-Crewed Tanker That May Have Been Iran-Bound
title_cn: 美国袭击可能开往伊朗的印度油轮
summary: The US military fired at an empty tanker for its suspected involvement in the Iranian oil trade this week as Washington continues to enforce a blockade of the Islamic Republic’s ports.

title: Pentagon Accuses Alibaba, Baidu of Aiding China’s Military
title_cn: 五角大楼指责阿里巴巴、百度援助中国军方
summary: The Pentagon accused some of China’s biggest companies, including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., Baidu Inc. and BYD Co. of supporting the Chinese military, doubling down on an earlier decision to label crown jewels of the country’s corporate world as threats to US national security.

title: UK’s Starmer to Announce Under-16s Social Media Ban Within Days
title_cn: 英国 Starmer 将在几天内宣布禁止 16 岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is preparing to announce a ban on under-16s using social media within days after his position hardened following parents’ response to a government consultation.

title: Malaysia Islamist Party Breaks With Ally, Jolting Opposition
title_cn: 马来西亚伊斯兰党与盟友决裂，震动反对派
summary: Malaysia’s largest Islamist party has moved to sever formal ties with its ally, deepening a rift within the opposition bloc ahead of the next general election.

title: OpenAI Files for IPO with SpaceX Debut Well Oversubscribed | Daybreak Europe 6/09/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 申请首次公开募股 (IPO)，SpaceX 首次亮相就获得超额认购欧洲黎明 6/09/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT, filed confidentially for an IPO, joining artificial intelligence rivals in tapping public markets to fund ambitious growth plans. SpaceX’s initial public offering is well oversubscribed with multiple institutional investors placing orders for about $10 billion or more of shares in the Elon Musk-led company, according to people familiar with the matter, as demand builds for a potentially record-setting debut.

A rebound in equities that began on Wall Street extended into Asia, as cheaper valuations for artificial intelligence shares lured investors. Crude oil declined as tensions in the Middle East eased. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Becerra, Hilton on Track for California Governor Race
title_cn: 贝塞拉和希尔顿有望参加加州州长竞选
summary: The race for California governor is on track for a two-person runoff in November between veteran Democratic politician Xavier Becerra and Republican Steve Hilton, a British-born television personality endorsed by President Donald Trump. Bloomberg's Jon Herskovitz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Moves to Shift Cost of Drone Defenses Onto Companies
title_cn: 俄罗斯采取行动将无人机防御成本转嫁给公司
summary: Russia is passing on some of the responsibility for protecting critical factories and infrastructure onto private companies as Kyiv ramps up drone attacks on industrial plants, ports and oil refineries.

title: Trump Says Peace Talks on Track After Israel-Iran Clashes End
title_cn: 特朗普称以色列和伊朗冲突结束后和平谈判步入正轨
summary: US President Donald Trump renewed his claims of momentum toward ending the conflict with Iran, after brokering a halt to hostilities between Israel and the Islamic Republic and easing tensions that had threatened to derail broader peace efforts.

title: Indonesia Moves to Expand Police Role in Civilian Government
title_cn: 印度尼西亚采取行动扩大警察在文职政府中的作用
summary: Indonesia will allow police officers to legally hold civilian administrative positions, a move that could increase the role of security officials in government.

title: ‘Skillful Populism’ Has Swiss Set for Tight Population Cap Vote
title_cn: “熟练的民粹主义”让瑞士面临紧缩的人口上限投票
summary: Switzerland is set for a nail-biter vote on a proposal to cap the population at 10 million, after a two-pronged push by campaigners that paired a polished appeal to sustainability-minded moderates with harsher anti-immigrant messaging.

title: Knicks Fall to Spurs in First Home Finals Game in a Generation
title_cn: 尼克斯队在一代人以来的第一场主场总决赛中输给马刺队
summary: The tickets were priced as high as six figures, but money is no guarantee of happiness.

title: Singapore Pivots From Baby Incentives as Fertility Rate Hits Low
title_cn: 随着生育率下降，新加坡放弃婴儿激励措施
summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong said his government will focus on making life better for families and rely less on incentives to encourage citizens to have more babies, as the city-state grapples with a record-low fertility rate.

title: Becerra, Hilton Advance in California Governor Election, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: Becerra、希尔顿在加州州长选举中取得进展，DDHQ 项目
summary: The race for California governor is on track for a two-person runoff in November between veteran Democratic politician Xavier Becerra and Republican Steve Hilton, a British-born television personality endorsed by President Donald Trump.

title: Xi Pledges Deeper Ties With Kim While Avoiding Nuclear Issue
title_cn: 习近平承诺与金正恩深化关系，同时避免核问题
summary: President Xi Jinping vowed to expand China’s trade, agriculture and technology cooperation with North Korea, while avoiding public mentions of its neighbor’s nuclear program in a meeting with Kim Jong Un in Pyongyang.

title: UN Says Children Are Dying in Cuba Because of Strict US Sanctions
title_cn: 联合国表示，由于美国的严格制裁，古巴儿童正在死亡
summary: Tighter US sanctions on Cuba have led to a spike in infant mortality and plummeting survival rates for child cancer patients, the United Nations warned in one of its strongest rebukes of Washington’s pressure campaign against the island.

title: Balance of Power: Late Edition 6/8/2026
title_cn: 权力平衡：最新版 6/8/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Sen. Roger Marshall (R) Kansas, Atlantic Council’s Eurasia Center Distinguished Fellow Ambassador William Taylor, Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi (D) Illinois, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Democracy Visiting Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michigan, Canada Plan Opening of Bridge Trump Threatened to Block
title_cn: 密歇根州和加拿大计划开通大桥 特朗普威胁要阻止
summary: Officials in the US and Canada are planning a ribbon-cutting ceremony in the coming days for a new C$6.4 billion ($4.6 billion) bridge linking Michigan to the province of Ontario, which President Donald Trump threatened to block earlier this year.

title: Treasury Asked to Clarify Fast-Growing ETF Tax-Busting Strategy
title_cn: 财政部被要求澄清快速增长的 ETF 避税策略
summary: The Investment Company Institute has asked the US Treasury Department for guidance on a fast-growing ETF strategy that allows investors to sidestep immediate capital-gains taxes, as uncertainty grows over how regulators view the practice.

title: Sen. Marshall Sees Case for Recourse in Weaponization Claims
title_cn: 参议员马歇尔认为武器化索赔有追索权
summary: Sen. Roger Marshall (R-KS) says he would support "some type of recourse" for people targeted by the federal government, but wants limits to exclude violent offenders, emphasizing his support would be contingent on details. He also discusses FISA, reconciliation and the threat of screwworm cases to US cattle supplies with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Amb. Taylor: Ukraine is Winning the War
title_cn: 前大使。泰勒：乌克兰正在赢得战争
summary: Former US Ambassador to Ukraine William Taylor says Ukraine is winning the war, pointing to battlefield gains, deeper strikes inside Russia and pressure on Vladimir Putin's economy. He also discusses US support for Kyiv and calls for stronger weapons, sanctions and backing for Ukraine with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Krishnamoorthi: FISA at Risk Over Pulte Pick
title_cn: 众议员 Krishnamoorthi：FISA 面临普尔特选择的风险
summary: Democratic Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi of Illinois says President Trump should pull Bill Pulte as acting director of national intelligence to save FISA, warning he does not see Democrats backing reauthorization if Pulte remains in the position. The House Intelligence Committee member also discusses OpenAI, AI regulation, US-China tech competition and the Iran conflict with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peru’s Diaspora Emerges as Tie-Breaker in Razor-Edge Presidential Race
title_cn: 秘鲁侨民成为刀锋总统竞选中的决胜者
summary: Peru’s presidential election is so tight that it’ll likely be citizens abroad, rather than those from within the country, who will break the tie.

title: Bolivia President Signs Law to Toughen Crackdown on Protests
title_cn: 玻利维亚总统签署法律加强对抗议活动的镇压
summary: Bolivia’s embattled President Rodrigo Paz signed a measure that clears the way for a more aggressive crackdown on anti-government protests that have rocked the South American country for more than five weeks.

title: Apple Announces AI Revamp as Chip Stocks Soar| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/8/2026
title_cn: 随着芯片股飙升，苹果宣布人工智能改造|彭博商业周刊日报 6/8/2026
summary: Today, Ed Ludlow from Apple's Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, as the tech giant announces a reworked AI slate, including a revamped Siri. Then, LinkedIn head of economics, Americas Kory Kantenga,  discusses the labor market as businesses and new grads feels the impact of AI. Plus, author and podcast host Ruthie Rogers talks food culture and her new book 'Table 4 at the River Cafe.' Also, Lisa Abramowicz talks with Vale CEO Gustavo Pimenta live in Rio de Janeiro (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Latest Midterms Problem Is an Emboldened Iran
title_cn: 特朗普最新的中期选举问题是伊朗的胆大妄为
summary: The US president fails to replicate his Venezuela success in the Middle East.
